description:
Official-looking document(s) in Arabic script. 

T-S NS 327.63
Recto contains two documents headed by the glyph and with similar formatting. The upper parts of documents that used to below are also preserved, as well as the crease where the larger page was torn (one flap remains from the lower portion that was torn off). The documents are very difficult to read. Verso contains what looks like a filing note, possibly mentioning Diwān al-Kharāj (the tax bureau). 

T-S NS 327.64
Two more documents with nearly identical layout to the documents in T-S NS 327.63, and with similar filing notes on verso.

Merits further examination.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
